title: hieracium bohatschianum subsp. onosmoidiforme
intro: Hieracium bohatschianum subsp. onosmoidiforme, also known as Onosma-like Hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Hieracium bohatschianum subsp. onosmoidiforme include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from skin conditions to respiratory problems.
